authoring.note: A capability is real multi-file source authored to a clean, runnable product tree at the project root (src/{project}/{slug}/), OUTSIDE the .factory/ instance state — graded in place by its sibling verify.mjs critic harness (worker-deny). Logic in pure ES modules the harness imports headlessly; rendering in a thin shell.

adapters.name: app-shell
adapters.note: The integration gate: a capability.*.shell cell is the runnable app ENTRY (index.html), graded by app-shell-check — canvas + a module entry + every product import RESOLVES. Catches the 'built modules but no assembled app' gap a headless verify.mjs cannot (a re-export barrel passes module checks but is not a running app). Static/headless; runtime render coherence is the next adapter (a browser/headless-gl harness).

adapters.name: spec-contract
verifier: import sys; t=open(sys.argv[1], encoding='utf-8').read(); sys.exit(0 if ('acceptance_criteria' in t and 'non_goals' in t) else 1)
